welcome_p1: This test measures your visual memory and ability to learn the locations of patterns.
welcome_p2: You will see boxes arranged in a circle. Each box will open one at a time to reveal a pattern or remain empty. Then you will be asked to recall which pattern was in which box.
welcome_p3: The difficulty increases with each level — more patterns to remember. You have up to 4 attempts per level.
tutorial_step1_text: Eight boxes are arranged in a circle. They will open one by one. Some contain a colored pattern, others are empty. Watch carefully!
tutorial_step2_text: Pay attention to which box contains which pattern. You will need to recall these associations afterwards.
tutorial_step3_text: A pattern will be shown in the center. Click the box where you think that pattern was located.
tutorial_step4_text: Each level has more patterns to remember (2, 4, 6, 8). If you get all correct, you advance. You have up to 4 attempts per level. The test ends when you fail all attempts or complete all levels.
demo_intro: Watch how the test works step by step.
demo_step1: Boxes are arranged on the screen. Each will open one by one.
demo_step2: A box opens to reveal a pattern inside. Remember its location!
demo_step3: Another box opens — this one also has a pattern. Some boxes may be empty.
demo_step4: Now a pattern appears in the center. Click the box where you saw this pattern.
demo_step5: Correct! The box lights up green. An incorrect choice shows the correct location.
demo_step6: You understand how it works. Ready to practice?
practice_complete_text1: Well done! You have completed the practice round.
practice_complete_text2: In the real test, the number of patterns will increase with each level. Try to remember all the pattern locations!
phase_presenting: Watch carefully — remember where each pattern is!
presenting_instruction: The boxes are opening one by one. Memorize the pattern locations.
recalling_instruction: Click the box where you saw this pattern.
recall_prompt: Pattern {{current}} of {{total}} — click the correct box
feedback_level_complete: Level complete! Moving to the next level...
settings_max_attempts_desc: How many attempts the participant has to pass each level before the test ends.
settings_box_open_duration_desc: How long each box stays open during the presentation phase.
settings_inter_box_delay_desc: The pause between closing one box and opening the next.
settings_feedback_duration_desc: How long correct/incorrect feedback is displayed.
footer_description: A visual memory test measuring the ability to learn pattern-location associations.
